$schemaNotes: Server/CI-only monitoring registry. Never loaded by index.html or app.js. See docs/operations/employer-feed-monitoring.md.

sources.notes: Existing LIVE Lever integration (api/dnb-lever-jobs.js, unmodified by this monitoring process). This entry independently rechecks source availability and searches for new qualifying Jacksonville student/early-talent postings; it does not affect the browser-facing endpoint or its registry (live-opportunity-sources.js).

Fanatics Corporate board. Watching for a qualifying Jacksonville student/early-talent posting; not connected to the WorkJax UI.
